# Skills Index

Load the relevant skill before starting any task.

| Skill | Load when |
|---|---|
| core | Every task |
| code-standards | Writing, reviewing, or refactoring C# code |
| design | Designing, architecting, or implementing patterns |
| dotnet-best-practices | Writing, reviewing, refactoring, or optimizing .NET/C# code |
| csharp-xunit | Get best practices for XUnit unit testing, including data-driven tests |

## Paths

- `skills/core/SKILL.md`
- `skills/code-standards/SKILL.md`
- `skills/design/SKILL.md`
- `skills/dotnet-best-practices/SKILL.md`
- `skills/csharp-xunit/SKILL.md`
